description: Deep scout research: parallel agents search skills, MCP, and GitHub simultaneously. Synthesizer merges, deduplicates, and ranks. Activated via scout:find --deep.

agents.name: researcher-skills
agents.role: Search Claude Code skills directories and repositories

agents.name: researcher-mcp
agents.role: Search MCP server registries and npm packages

agents.name: researcher-github
agents.role: Search GitHub repos with AI integration and CLI tools

agents.name: synthesizer
agents.role: Merge, deduplicate, and rank results from all researchers
